title: Section 21
content: Any reference to Himachal Pradesh in the Representation of the People Act, 1950 (43 of 1950), 1 * * *, as amended by this Act shall be construed as a reference to the new State.
footnote: 1 . The words, letters and figures "and the Government of Part C States Act, 1951" omitted by the A. O. (No.3), 1956.
